file_insights.changes: Added support for team directories (.cards/team-*/) and .jobcard file extension format
file_insights.impact: Critical fix enabling merge-gate to process team-organized card structures
file_insights.pattern: Directory pattern matching now supports both flat and team-namespaced layouts
Dispatch wave tracking spec completion across auto-claude ecosystem

file_insights.changes: QA signoff section populated with rejection status and manual verification requirements
file_insights.impact: Blocks spec 004 completion pending user manual verification
file_insights.pattern: Environmental limitation (Nu policy restrictions) preventing automated QA closure

file_insights.changes: New file documenting manual verification pathway for integration tests
file_insights.impact: Provides clear instructions for user to complete QA phase
file_insights.pattern: Fallback documentation when Auto-Claude environment cannot execute required verification
Lock lifecycle: created on wave start, deleted on wave completion

patterns_discovered.description: merge-gate.rs updated to handle .cards/team-{name}/ directory pattern alongside flat .cards/ layout
patterns_discovered.relevance: Essential for real-world team-based card organization as documented in MEMORY.md

patterns_discovered.description: Auto-Claude dispatch executes specs in order (001→002→003→004→005), advancing state in dispatch-state.json after each completion
patterns_discovered.relevance: Wave-based orchestration model prevents out-of-order execution and dependency issues

patterns_discovered.description: Policy restrictions prevent Nu command execution in Auto-Claude environment; QA creates manual verification task with explicit commands for user to run
patterns_discovered.relevance: Acceptance criteria require test execution that environment cannot support; fallback is detailed manual verification instructions

patterns_discovered.description: implementation_plan.json now contains qa_signoff object with status, timestamp, issues_found array, and qa_iteration_history
patterns_discovered.relevance: Standardized QA tracking across auto-claude ecosystem with issue categorization and iteration history

patterns_discovered.description: Spec 004 demonstrates pattern where all code is correct (unit tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean) but integration test execution blocked by environment
patterns_discovered.relevance: Distinguishes code quality issues from environmental limitations; enables QA to pass verification of infrastructure while blocking on execution

gotchas_discovered.issue: Policy blocks Nu command execution in Auto-Claude environment
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot automatically verify spec 004 acceptance criteria: test-real-adapters.nu execution
gotchas_discovered.workaround: QA_FIX_REQUEST.md provides explicit manual commands with expected outputs for user to run externally
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document environmental limitations in spec upfront; pre-identify which acceptance criteria require manual verification

gotchas_discovered.issue: File extension and directory pattern assumptions in merge-gate.rs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Previous code expected flat .cards/ layout; team-based structure .cards/team-*/ was unhandled
gotchas_discovered.workaround: Enhanced merge-gate.rs to support both patterns via commit e770977
gotchas_discovered.prevention: When designing filesystem state machines, document and test against all directory structure variations upfront

gotchas_discovered.issue: QA iteration history shows rejection, not fix loop
gotchas_discovered.impact: Spec 004 marked as 'rejected' but this is architectural (requires manual verification), not a failure requiring code fix
gotchas_discovered.workaround: QA_FIX_REQUEST.md clarifies distinction: 'This is NOT a Code Defect'
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Distinguish QA status codes: 'rejected_environmental' vs 'rejected_code_issue' for clarity in dispatch workflows

gotchas_discovered.issue: merge-gate.rs must handle both .jobcard/ and legacy directory formats
gotchas_discovered.impact: Spec 005 (run-merge-gate) requires format compatibility to process all queued cards without failure
gotchas_discovered.workaround: Commit e770977 adds extension detection logic
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Add test coverage for format migrations; document breaking changes in state machine evolution

approach_outcome.objective: Run merge-gate repeatedly until all done/ cards are processed
approach_outcome.completion_signal: Spec 005 (run-merge-gate) entered completed array in dispatch-state.json; dispatch-lock.json deleted
approach_outcome.key_achievement: merge-gate.rs fixed to support team directory structure (.cards/team-*/) enabling real-world card processing
blockers_resolved: Infinite retry loop prevention (spec 005 addresses merge-gate retry logic)
approach_outcome.downstream_impact: Spec 006 (job-control-retry-kill-logs) can now proceed; team-based card workflow validated
approach_outcome.qa_status: Spec 004 QA pending manual user verification; code infrastructure verified correct

recommendations.recommendation: User must execute manual verification for spec 004
recommendations.action: Run `nu --no-config-file scripts/test-real-adapters.nu --adapter codex --timeout 120` and provide output to QA_FIX_REQUEST.md
recommendations.impact: Unblocks spec 004 closure and enables spec 005+ to advance if all prior specs complete

recommendations.recommendation: Add test coverage for team directory structure in merge_gate_harness.rs
recommendations.action: Create test case with .cards/team-{name}/ directory layout to prevent regression
recommendations.impact: Ensures merge-gate robustness against directory structure variations; prevents future gotchas

recommendations.recommendation: Document environmental QA limitations in spec templates
recommendations.action: Add section in auto-claude spec template identifying which acceptance criteria require manual verification due to policy restrictions
recommendations.impact: Reduces surprise QA rejections; enables upfront planning of verification strategy

recommendations.recommendation: Extend dispatch-state.json to track QA status separately from completion status
recommendations.action: Add qa_status field alongside spec completion to distinguish 'code_complete_awaiting_manual_qa' from 'complete'
recommendations.impact: Improves visibility into which specs are blocked on manual verification vs awaiting next spec

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor merge-gate behavior in production with team directories
recommendations.action: Add logging to track .cards/team-*/ path processing; watch for edge cases with deeply nested structures
recommendations.impact: Early detection of format-related issues; informs future state machine enhancements
